description: Cached daily global news snapshot for reproducible analysis. Replace this file with fresh data by calling get_global_news and saving the output.

articles.title: Federal Reserve Signals Potential Rate Pause Amid Mixed Economic Data
articles.summary: The Federal Reserve indicated it may hold interest rates steady at its next meeting, citing conflicting signals from employment and inflation reports.

articles.title: NVIDIA Unveils Next-Generation AI Chip Architecture at Annual Conference
articles.summary: NVIDIA announced its latest GPU architecture promising 3x performance gains for AI training workloads, sending shares higher in pre-market trading.

articles.title: European Union Reaches Agreement on Comprehensive AI Regulation Framework
articles.summary: EU member states finalized the AI Act implementation guidelines, establishing compliance timelines for tech companies operating in the bloc.

articles.title: Oil Prices Surge After OPEC+ Announces Deeper Production Cuts
articles.summary: Brent crude jumped 4% after the OPEC+ alliance agreed to extend and deepen supply cuts through Q3, tightening global oil markets.

articles.title: Tesla Expands Supercharger Network Partnership with Major Automakers
articles.summary: Tesla signed agreements with three additional automakers to open its Supercharger network, cementing NACS as the de facto North American charging standard.
